reviews.review_msg: He is just a kind and great person who cares deeply about his field and transfers that to students in an accommodating manner. Great at being available outside of class time and providing advice, and it's a joy to hear the targents he goes on which leave you feeling a little inspired if that's not cheesy to say.

I enjoyed taking this class with Dr. Murphy as he is very understanding and tries to make online learning fun. Aside from being a nice guy, there are some issues with the course. His grading rubric are unclear )until I followed up with my TA), and he chose to take out participation and average the scores. Could have gotten an A+ but still happy.

I have taken four classes with David now because he is such a great prof. The topics he teaches are interesting and you get to do work in production rather than just writing papers. Taking this course online was a bit difficult since we could not use the lab, but David helped make sure his students had access to the necessary softwares.

David Murphy is the best professor I have ever had. I took his class online during the pandemic and he was supportive, understanding, and very accommodating. He truly cares about his students and their well-being. He was always available for extra help on assignments and gave great feedback. Take his class!!

He knows what he's talking about and seems to work in the field of sound and has connections. I enjoyed his projects despite really only showing up to 3 classes the entire semester. As long as you do the projects well, you should get a good grade. Labs are more important than lectures.

David is probably the best prof I've had in my five years at SFU. His lectures are engaging, interesting and he's a really funny, genuine guy. He's always willing to help with projects and answer questions, super supportive.

Honestly a terrible prof. Not only are his assignment guidelines beyond vague but his syllabus has no dates on it and he doesn't bring up a deadline until about 4 days before they're supposed to be done. Very unorganized and lackluster. Also he just expects you to fumble your way through Logic Pro, never actually taught us how to use the software

Horrible. No direction the entire class; vague comments on how to do assignments. When grades come back (at the end of the semester, not right when it's marked) you get a much lower mark than he lets off. Do not take.
BEST professor I had in 4 years!! Really nice and informative classes. David is just so nice!! Awesome professor!! Hope to take a course with him again.

I loved both the coursework and lectures. The unfavourable guy back here must be really annoying, anyhow this is a laid back prof who knows a lot about the subject matter.  Make sure you pick his brains not just for theories, but also for the methods you can use in your projects - as this is a project driven course...
